subcodes.first_line: These are the days of the All-Merciful, and the lamp of divine favor is enkindled and luminous at the pole of existence. Blessed is the soul that hath drawn nigh unto this resplendent lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام ایام رحمن و سراج عنایت در قطب امکان مشتعل و منیر مبارک نفسیکه باین سراج وهاج
subcodes.subjects: @power of the Manifestation of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
